title: Career Center Appointment
transcript: Student: Hello, I'd like to make an appointment with a career counselor. I need help with my resume for internship applications. Receptionist: Of course. We have availability tomorrow at 10 AM and Thursday at 2 PM. Student: Thursday at 2 PM works better for me. Receptionist: I'll book that for you. Please bring a draft of your resume and a job description for the internship you're targeting. Student: Will the counselor review my cover letter too? Receptionist: Yes, but you should mention that when you arrive so they can allocate enough time. Student: Understood. Also, does the career center offer mock interviews? Receptionist: Yes, we do. You can sign up for a mock interview after your resume appointment. They're held every Friday morning. Student: That's perfect. I'm nervous about the interview process. Receptionist: Many students feel that way. The practice sessions are very helpful. We'll send you a confirmation email with the location. Student: Thank you so much.

questions.stem: Why does the student visit the career center?
options: To get help preparing application materials
questions.explanation: The student wants help with their resume for internship applications.

questions.stem: What does the receptionist say about mock interviews?
options: They are mandatory for all students
They are available every Friday morning
They must be scheduled three weeks in advance
They are only for graduate students
questions.explanation: The receptionist says mock interviews are held every Friday morning and can be signed up for after the resume appointment.
